channel.title: Study Abroad Guide Cost Comparison
channel.description: Your ultimate resource for comparing the costs of studying abroad in the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and more.

item.description:

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to US vs UK Study Abroad Costs (2026)
item.description:
